description: Indian healthcare technology company providing doctor discovery, appointment booking, practice management software, and medicine delivery. Largest healthcare platform in India connecting patients with healthcare providers.
business_model: B2B/B2C - Marketplace and SaaS to healthcare providers and patients
key_investors: Tencent, Sequoia Capital, Matrix Partners, others
competitive_advantage: Market leader in India, comprehensive platform, strong brand recognition

varden_fit.rationale: Indian market leader - demonstrates emerging market healthcare infrastructure
